Sync inventory, orders & sales across all your laptops and phones — instantly, automatically.

⚙️ Setup & Connection
Laptop 1 (Owner/Manager)
1. Get a free API key at jsonbin.io
2. Enter it below and name your device
3. Click Create → share the Share Code with other devices
📋 Share Code — Send to other devices
Other devices (Laptop 2, 3, Phone…)
Ask the owner for the Share Code and paste it below. That's it — no API keys needed.
📡 BroadcastChannel — instant sync between tabs in the same browser, zero config.
🗃 JSONBin / Gist — sync across different devices/browsers with a free account.
EasySync status will appear here after connecting.
Connected
Bin ID: —
📡 Live Status
🔌
Set up Group Sync or EasySync to see live status here.
📋 Share Code
Send this code to other devices so they can join your sync group.
📋 Sync Activity Log
No activity yet.
💡 How Group Sync Works
🖥 Laptop 1 (Owner) → Create → gets a Share Code
📱 Other devices → Join → paste Share Code
⚡ Every save auto-pushes within 1 second
🔄 Pulls every 60 seconds · Push on every save
☁️ Data stored free on JSONBin.io
🔒 Your data, your bin — no third-party access

Biometric Security

Fingerprint / Device Auth

Uses WebAuthn (FIDO2) standard. Works with fingerprint sensor, Windows Hello, or Touch ID on your device.

✦ Access Control
Multi-User System
Role-based permissions · Encrypted passwords · Suspicious activity alerts · Anti-hacking protection
🔑 Role Permissions
👑 Owner
Full access · Manage users · View all data · Delete records · Cloud sync
🔷 Admin
All sales · Inventory · Reports · Returns · No user management
💚 Cashier
Walk-in POS · Bills · View inventory · No delete · No reports
👁️ Viewer
Read-only dashboard · Overview · No edits · No POS
➕ Add New User
🤳 Face ID (optional — can enroll now or skip)
No face enrolled. Use camera to capture face at creation time.
🚨 Suspicious Activity Monitor
🛡️ Anti-Hacking Protection
🔒 PBKDF2 Encryption
Passwords hashed with 200,000 iterations — immune to brute-force
🚫 Login Lockout
5 failed attempts → 15-min lockout with suspicious alert
🔑 2FA / TOTP
RFC 6238 authenticator support — optional per-user setup
🌐 JWT Sessions
24-hour expiring tokens with device fingerprinting
📡 Real-time Sync
20-second cloud pull with conflict detection and merge
📋 Audit Trail
Every login, sale, edit logged with timestamps and user

✦ Real-Time Cloud Sync
Cloud Database

Push / pull your entire ERP to Supabase, Firebase, or any REST endpoint. Two-way sync.

Offline
Status
0
Records
—
Last Sync
⚙️ Connection Settings
💡 Supabase Quick Start
1. Create project on supabase.com
2. Run SQL: create table erp_data(id text primary key, payload jsonb, updated_at timestamptz default now());
3. Copy Project URL + anon key above. Done ✓

⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts
Enterprise shortcuts for maximum productivity
🏢
Branch Portals
Each branch is a fully isolated portal — same screens, separate data.
Switching reloads the app into the selected branch. Auth, users and master key stay shared across branches.
